name: food-ordering-system
description: Online Food Ordering System - Microservices MVP (SLIIT IT4020)

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd user-service && npm install && cd ../restaurant-service && npm install && cd ../order-service && npm install && cd ../payment-service && npm install && cd ../api-gateway && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ..
scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix-colors "bgBlue.bold,bgGreen.bold,bgYellow.bold,bgMagenta.bold,bgCyan.bold,bgWhite.black.bold" --names "USER,REST,ORDER,PAY,GW,WEB" "npm run start:user" "npm run start:restaurant" "npm run start:order" "npm run start:payment" "npm run start:gateway" "npm run start:frontend"
